resource.conclusion: Radiography of Chest A-P View(Supine) Show:Widening of upper mediastinum. Cardiomegaly. Tortuous thoracic aorta with calcified aortic knob. Consolidation over bilateral lower lung fields Obliteration of bilateral lateral costophrenic angles Degenerative change of visible spine with spurs formation. Colonic gas interposed in right subphrenic region between liver and diaphragm.Suggest clinical check up and follow up.

coding.display: 電腦斷層造影  －  無造影劑

code.text: 電腦斷層造影  －  無造影劑

resource.conclusion: Computed Tomography of Brain Without Enhancement Show:Method:   Axial noncontrast 5 mm sections from the skull base to the vertex were obtained.Coronal reconstruction images also obtained.Impression:1. No apparent ICH2. Senile cortical atrophy and cerebral small vessel disease.3. Pan-paranasal sinusitis.Other Interpretations:1. The cerebrum and cerebellum show prominent cerebral fissures, cisterns ＆ sulci2. The ventricles are diffusely dilated3. The interhemispheric fissure is situated in the midline4. Normal cerebral attenuation5. The sella and pituitary are normal6. Parasellar structures are unremarkable7. There are no abnormalities in the cerebellopontine angle area on both sides8. Well pneumatization of bil mastoid air cells9. The orbital contents are unremarkable10. There are no abnormalities in the calvarium

code.text: 胸腔檢查（包括各種角度部位之胸腔檢查）

resource.conclusion: Radiography of Chest A-P View(Supine) Show:Obliteration of the right heart border. Cardiomegaly. Prominent bilateral hilar vessels. Inferiorly displaced right pulmonary hilum. Suspicious for bronchiectasis over bilateral lower lung field.Consolidation in right lower lung field with volume shrinkage.Patchy consolidation over left lower lung field(s).Obliteration of bilateral lateral costophrenic angles. Left apical pleural change. Degenerative change of visible spine with spurs formation.

resource.title: 末期腎臟病前期（Pre-ESRD）之病人照護與衛教計畫
resource.description: 對慢性腎臟病之高危險群進行個案管理，以期早期發現，積極治療與介入，以有效延緩進入透析治療之時機與併發症之發生。

resource.title: 初期慢性腎病追蹤
resource.description: 為提升初期慢性腎臟病照護品質，鼓勵醫療院所提供個案管理服務，透過定期回診、定期監測檢驗(查)結果及客製化衛教，提供病人全方位照護。
